reviews.review_description:
Finally found a game that feels like Tron in VR and then some!

I wish there was more to the story since it's kind of short, but hopefully there's more to come in future updates.
I didn't knew what to expect when I started this game but it's actually pretty good so far, the art style is simple but clever and you can feel the dev put a lot of effort into the game !
Really excited for this then it bugs me out on the first driveling mission where doesn’t matter how close to the sunset I get it drops me at the beginning, why!!???.
Whenever I play I have a blast and I always pick up the save files but when I leave the game and get back in I start from the vary beginning
